title: If you could resurrect one character who would it be
display_title: If you could resurrect one character who would it be
wikitext:
[]: If you could resurrect one character, who would it be?             Quote Post by Cze » Sat Apr 04, 2009 3:29 am Hey, If you could ressurect a character, who would that be? (If they dont return fromt the sea of lcl of course).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2009 4:43 am Dr. Katsuragi. Provided I get to imagine the one in my heart, because no other will do.

[]:             Quote Post by jenova7 » Sat Apr 04, 2009 5:23 am i'd ressurect toji, if only to brighten up the post-3rd impact world

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Sat Apr 04, 2009 5:42 am Um, let's see if it's just Shinji and Asuka. I will bring back Kaworu... LET THE LOVE TRIANGLE ENSUE.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Apr 04, 2009 8:18 am Sachiel(For the lulz)

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Apr 04, 2009 11:33 am Toshiro Mifune

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Apr 04, 2009 11:39 am Pen-pen, as they might get hungry in a post impact world.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Sat Apr 04, 2009 11:54 am Kaji. He'd be a good bud and he'd keep that Asuka bitch occupied so that I wouldn't have to deal with her. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Apr 04, 2009 12:07 pm I would choose Yui or Pen-pen.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Apr 04, 2009 12:44 pm Iruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2009 1:15 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei dummy plug clones Sachiel(For the lulz)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Apr 04, 2009 1:21 pm Reichu wrote: What? Not "fem-Kaworu"? What is this world coming to??

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Sat Apr 04, 2009 1:26 pm I would bring back... Misato. for the lulz.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Apr 04, 2009 2:22 pm Reichu wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei dummy plug clones Sachiel(For the lulz)

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Apr 04, 2009 2:40 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Sat Apr 04, 2009 3:07 pm Alternatively, I could bring back Giant Naked Rei. Watch the madness ensue.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Apr 04, 2009 4:05 pm The pilot of EVA-04, just so they could see how much their development team screwed up. Them or Sigmund Freud so he could see his vision come to life then get killed again by it in HIGH DEFINITION .

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Apr 04, 2009 5:41 pm Maya, for the lulz. she would freeeeak out at post 3I earth

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Apr 04, 2009 6:32 pm The Shinji from the series who was mysteriously replaced before the movie began.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Apr 04, 2009 6:34 pm NemZ wrote: The Shinji from the series who was mysteriously replaced before the movie began.
